The President of India, acting through and represented by the Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways, Government of India has informed the Exchange about an announcement with respect to offer for sale through Stock Exchange Mechanism for sale upto 66,29,636 Equity shares of face value of INR 5/- each of Cochin Shipyard Limited. Date and time of the opening of the offer for Non-Retail Investors: July 07, 2026 at 9:15 a.m.; Date and time of the closing of the offer for Non-Retail Investors: July 07, 2026 at 3:30 p.m.; Date and time of the opening of the offer for Retail Investors: July 08, 2026 at 9:15 a.m.; Date and time of the closing of the offer for Retail Investors: July 08, 2026 at 3:30 p.m. The Sale shall continue to take place on a separate window of the Stock Exchanges commencing at 9:15 a.m. and shall close at 3:30 p.m. (Indian Standard Time) on the same date. The Floor Price for the Offer shall be INR 1400/- (Rupees One Thousand and Four Hundred only). |SUBJECT: Offer for sale
